column1: The management of Access Holdings Plc assessed the effectiveness of the internal control over financial
reporting of the Company and its subsidiaries (together “the Group”) as of 31 December 2024 using the
criteria set forth in Internal Control—Integrated Framework (2013 issued by the Committee of Sponsoring
Organizations of the Treadway Commission (“the COSO Framework”) and in accordance with the SEC
Guidance on Implementation of Sections 60 – 63 of Investments and Securities Act, 2007.
